betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Copper Plates§f

§aPress copper ingots into flat plates — a fundamental building material.§f

Copper is a common metal found deep underground. Smelt ore into ingots, then press them into §bcopper plates§f at the burner press (with plate stamp), assembly machine, or anvil.

§6Uses§f:
Machine casings, circuits, press preheaters, blast furnaces, and countless other components. Copper is also alloyed with redstone to produce §bred copper§f.

§eTip§f: Always keep a stock. You will need hundreds as you progress.
